name: partner-center-onboarding
description: Guided troubleshooting for Microsoft Partner Center account verification when publishing Microsoft 365 Copilot agents to the Microsoft Commercial Marketplace. Converges identity, legal-entity/tenant, business-existence, and process-visibility friction into one verified, publish-ready account state. Authored as portable Agent Skills (SKILL.md) usable in GitHub Copilot CLI and packageable for Microsoft 365 Copilot Cowork.
